qa_pairs.question: What is the location of the job script mentioned in the example support request?
qa_pairs.answer: The job script is located at `/my/job/script/path`.

qa_pairs.question: Has the job script been altered since its submission, according to the example?
qa_pairs.answer: No, the user states, "I have not changed it since submitting my job."

qa_pairs.question: Why was the job script included directly in the email example?
qa_pairs.answer: The job script was included in the email because it is short.

qa_pairs.question: What are the contents of the example job script provided in the support request?
qa_pairs.answer: The job script begins with `#!/bin/bash`, followed by SBATCH directives `--account=def-asmith-ab`, `--nodes=1`, `--ntasks-per-node=16`, `--time=00:05:00`, and the command `{ time mpiexec -n 1 ./sample1 ; } 2>out.time`.

qa_pairs.question: Which command was used to list the currently loaded modules in the support request example?
What were the first three modules listed as loaded at the time of the problem in the example?
qa_pairs.answer: The first three modules listed were `1) CCconfig`, `2) gentoo/2023 (S)`, and `3) gcccore/.12.3 (H)`.
